KXNFLGAME-26SEP13CHICAR-CAR.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Chicago vs Carolina professional football game originally scheduled for Sep 13, 2026. If the game is not started within 48 hours, the market will resolve to a fair market price.
